description: Game Boy Color ROM. Pink bunny collects yellow stars and purple flowers in a lavender garden. Music: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star.
generator: build_rom.py — pure Python, no assembler, no GB Studio.
cpu: SM83 (Sharp LR35902) — Game Boy CPU, Z80-like

color_theme.bg_palette_2: Score bar — dark purple + white/yellow text

wram_variables.0xC100: VBLANK_FLAG — set by ISR, cleared by game loop
wram_variables.0xC103: MUSIC_CTR — frame countdown to next note
wram_variables.0xC120: MOVING temp — set if any d-pad pressed this frame

hram.0xFF80-0xFF85: DMA wait routine (6 bytes): LD A,40 / DEC A / JR NZ,-3 / RET

rom_layout.0x0040-0x0047: VBlank ISR: PUSH AF / LD A,1 / LD (0xC100),A / POP AF / RETI
rom_layout.0x0104-0x014F: GBC ROM header (Nintendo logo, title, checksums)

tile_indices.0x10: Score bar BG (all color 0 = dark purple)
tile_indices.0x14: Star icon for score display (BG palette 2)
tile_indices.note: Bunny uses 8×16 OBJ mode. Left-facing = X-flip in OAM attr (bit 5 = 0x20)

lcdc_value: 0x97 = LCD on | tile data at 0x8000 | 8×16 OBJ | OBJ enabled | BG enabled

bg_map_layout.row_0: Score bar: col0=bar, col1=star_icon(0x14), col2-4=digit tiles, rest=bar

game_logic.game_loop: HALT → check VBLANK_FLAG → read_joypad → handle_input → check_collisions → update_oam → do_dma → music_tick → check_all_collected → update_score_display
game_logic.reset_condition: All 8 collectibles collected → reset all to initial positions

known_bugs_and_todo: Joypad routine reads P1 multiple times — could simplify
No sound envelope decay (notes play at constant volume, may sound abrupt)
D-pad only; A/B buttons unused (could add: A=jump animation, B=nothing)
No win fanfare beyond envelope reset
Bunny facing up/down not animated (stays in last horizontal dir)
Score capped at 99 but could extend to 255
Could add animated tiles (star twinkle) using frame-based tile swapping
Could add a second BG scroll layer for parallax
Music could add bass harmony on CH2

how_to_play.goal: Walk over all 8 stars and flowers to collect them

gbc_spec_notes.vram_bank_switch: Write 0/1 to 0xFF4F (VBK) to select VRAM bank
gbc_spec_notes.bg_palette: Write auto-increment addr to BCPS (0xFF68), stream bytes to BCPD (0xFF69)
gbc_spec_notes.oam_dma: Write high byte of source to 0xFF46; wait 160 cycles in HRAM only
gbc_spec_notes.8x16_sprites: OAM tile = even index N; top=tile N, bottom=tile N+1 (auto)
